mapper.select: SELECT A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, A.ACCOUNT_OWNER, A.ACCOUNT_TYPE_GROUP_CODE, A.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, C.CODE_NAME AS ACCOUNT_TYPE_NAME, A.BANK_GROUP_CODE, A.BANK_CODE, CB.CODE_NAME AS BANK_NAME, A.USE_YN, A.CREATED_AT, A.CREATED_BY, A.UPDATED_AT, A.UPDATED_BY FROM TB_ACCOUNT A JOIN TB_COMMON_CODE C ON A.ACCOUNT_TYPE_GROUP_CODE = C.GROUP_CODE AND A.ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE = C.COMMON_CODE JOIN TB_COMMON_CODE CB ON A.BANK_GROUP_CODE = CB.GROUP_CODE AND A.BANK_CODE = CB.COMMON_CODE WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_ACCOUNT ( ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_OWNER, ACCOUNT_TYPE_GROUP_CODE, ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE, BANK_GROUP_CODE, BANK_CODE, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{accountOwner}, #{accountTypeGroupCode}, #{accountTypeCode}, #{bankGroupCode}, #{bankCode}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_ACCOUNT SET ACCOUNT_OWNER = #{accountOwner}, ACCOUNT_TYPE_GROUP_CODE = #{accountTypeGroupCode}, ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE = #{accountTypeCode}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy} WHERE ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{accountNumber} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
